reasoning: The control requires the use of FIPS-validated cryptography to protect the confidentiality of Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd data is encrypted at rest, secrets are encrypted, and that the API server uses FIPS-compliant TLS configurations. These measures align with the goal of employing strong cryptographic protections for sensitive data.
title: 3_13_11: 3.13.11 Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI
